meaning: To wear or use for the first time

example: "Tengo un antojo de chocolate esta noche." (I have a craving for chocolate tonight.)
"El gato duerme en el rincón de mi casa." (The cat sleeps in the corner of my house.)
"Toma el jarabe con un poco de agua." (Take the syrup with a little bit of water.)
"Tuve una pesadilla anoche y no pude dormir." (I had a nightmare last night and couldn't sleep.)
"Tienes que apresurarte para llegar al aeropuerto a tiempo." (You have to hurry up to get to the airport on time.)
"Por favor, apaga la luz antes de salir" (Please turn off the light before leaving)

meaning: to aim / to take notes / to jot down
example: "El estudiante siempre apunta las instrucciones en su cuaderno" (The student always writes down the instructions in his notebook)
"El campo está muy apacible esta tarde de verano" (The countryside is very peaceful this summer afternoon)
"El viaje en autobús ha sido agotador" (The bus trip has been exhausting)

meaning: To fulfill/to fill to the brim
example: "Sus palabras me colmaron de alegría" (His words filled me with joy)
"El equipo pudo derrotar a los campeones ayer" (The team was able to defeat the champions yesterday)
"El coche pudo esquivar el perro en la carretera." (The car was able to dodge the dog on the highway.)
"Los niños hicieron un gran alboroto en el parque" (The children made a big racket in the park)
"Apenas tengo dinero para comprar comida" (I barely have money to buy food)
"Usamos un lenguaje coloquial con los amigos" (We use colloquial language with friends)
"El alojamiento en este hotel es muy caro." (The accommodation in this hotel is very expensive.)
"No quiero desafiar a mi jefe hoy." (I don't want to challenge my boss today.)
"Nosotros miramos el hermoso atardecer desde la playa." (We watch the beautiful sunset from the beach.)
"El semáforo está en rojo, por eso el taxi tiene que parar." (The traffic light is red, that's why the taxi has to stop.)
"El hallazgo de la carta vieja cambió mi vida." (The discovery of the old letter changed my life.)
"Ella no puede parar de bostezar durante la película." (She cannot stop yawning during the movie.)
"Escuché un susurro en la habitación oscura." (I heard a whisper in the dark room.)
"Desafortunadamente, olvidé mi cartera en el restaurante." (Unfortunately, I forgot my wallet at the restaurant.)
"Tuvimos un pequeño contratiempo con el coche, pero ya llegamos." (We had a small setback with the car, but we have arrived.)
"Sube el peldaño con cuidado." (Go up the step carefully.)
"El atleta tiene el aliento corto porque corre mucho" (The athlete has short breath because he runs a lot)
"Tomamos un atajo para llegar más rápido al hotel." (We took a shortcut to arrive faster at the hotel.)
"Ese rascacielos es el edificio más alto de la ciudad." (That skyscraper is the tallest building in the city.)
